zh.Kristenstad, Skane, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德斯奧
zh.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb於大約1355年出生在英國。她於大約1377年與Heurik Ulfstand在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Kristenstad, Skane, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德斯奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb于大约1355年出生在英国。她于大约1377年与Heurik Ulfstand在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Due
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (Düe): from the ancient Germanic personal name Dudo, which is of uncertain derivation. In some cases it is said to be a pet form of the compound name Liudolf (composed of Old Saxon liud ‘people, tribe’ + wolf ‘wolf’); in other cases it may be a derivative of ancient Germanic theud ‘people, race’.
Danish: from due ‘pigeon, dove’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a dove keeper or as a nickname.
French: variant of   Duhe   and, in North America, an altered form of this. Compare   Duet   1.

variants.name: Dudenhoeffer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alfons, Aloysius, Kurt.
German (Dudenhöffer): habitational name for someone from a farm named Dudenhof(f), from the personal name Dudo (see Due ) + Middle High German hof ‘farmstead, manor farm’.

variants.name: Duden
meanings: North German:
patronymic from the ancient Germanic personal name Dudo (see Due ).
habitational name from Duden, a place near (former) Gumbinnen in (former) East Prussia.

variants.name: Duhe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Marcel, Aime, Antoine, Leonce.
French (Duhé): variant of Duez and, in North America, an altered form of this. It is very rare in France. Compare Due 3.
History: The majority of the American bearers of the surname Duhe are descendants of Joseph Duez/Duhay/Duhé from France, who married Marie-Louise Trudel in L'Ange-Gardien, QC, in 1734.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Golb
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amod, Anil, Bharat, Madhu.
Polish: nickname derived from goły ‘naked, bare, or bald’.
Polish; Sorbian (Góla): topographic name from Polish gola, Lower Sorbian góla ‘bare heathland, place without trees’.

variants.name: Cola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Donato, Amelio, Dante, Domenic, Erminio, Luigi, Otello, Rino, Sal, Umberto.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Cola, a short form of Nicola, an equivalent of Nicholas .
Spanish: nickname from cola ‘tail’or ‘glue’.

variants.name: Golla
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Alois, Erwin, Gunter.  Indian Vinay, Krishna, Padma, Prasad, Satyanarayana.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Góla and Polish Gola .
East German: habitational name from any of the places called Gollau, in Lower Saxony, East Prussia, and Bavaria.

variants.name: Gohl
meanings: German (also Göhl): nickname for someone with a cheerful disposition, from a shortened form of Middle High German gogel ‘lively, boisterous’.
Swiss German: probably a nickname for a loud person, from Middle High German goln ‘to howl’.

East German (of Slavic origin; also Göhl): topographic name from a Germanized form of Lower Sorbian góla or Polish gola ‘bare heathland, place without trees’ (see Gola ), or a habitational name from a place called with this word.

nameMeanings.name: Kirsten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christine  , now also well established in the English-speaking world. A well-known bearer of the name was the Norwegian opera singer  Kirsten Flagstad  (  1895–1962 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb was born about 1355, in England. She married Heurik Ulfstand about 1377, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb est née environ 1355, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Heurik Ulfstand environ 1377, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb wurde um 1355 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1377 in England Heurik Ulfstand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb è nata il circa 1355 nel England. Lei sposato Heurik Ulfstand circa 1377, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Kristenstad, Skane, Norway: ノルウェーベストフォルドスクaン
ja.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golbは約1355年にイギリスで生まれた。約1377年にイギリスでHeurik Ulfstandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb(은)는 대략 1355년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1377년 영국에서 Heurik Ulfstand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb nasceu aproximadamente 1355, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Heurik Ulfstand aproximadamente 1377, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb родилась около 1355 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heurik Ulfstand около 1377 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Kirsten Due or Golb nació aproximadamente 1355, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Heurik Ulfstand aproximadamente 1377, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
